subject: Remove the hbase charts from aai
commit_message:
Remove the hbase charts from aai

Issue-ID: AAI-1186
Change-Id: Ie4af7ac0032afea4f92ce63eef8a7117ce000bc7
Signed-off-by: Kajur, Harish (vk250x) <vk250x@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

if I search everything for "hbase" there are still references to it.  Is hbase completely removed?  Maybe some additional patches to remove the following references where applicable as well...

./aai/charts/aai-resources/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:aai.logging.hbase.interceptor=true
./aai/charts/aai-resources/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:aai.logging.hbase.enabled=true
./aai/charts/aai-resources/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:aai.logging.hbase.logrequest=true
./aai/charts/aai-resources/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:aai.logging.hbase.logresponse=true
./aai/charts/aai-resources/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:hbase.table.name=aailogging.dev
./aai/charts/aai-resources/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:hbase.table.timestamp.format=YYYYMMdd-HH:mm:ss:SSS
./aai/charts/aai-resources/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:hbase.zookeeper.quorum=localhost
./aai/charts/aai-resources/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:hbase.zookeeper.property.clientPort=2181
./aai/charts/aai-resources/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:hbase.zookeeper.znode.parent=/hbase
./aai/charts/aai-traversal/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:aai.logging.hbase.interceptor=true
./aai/charts/aai-traversal/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:aai.logging.hbase.enabled=true
./aai/charts/aai-traversal/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:aai.logging.hbase.logrequest=true

./aai/charts/aai-traversal/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:hbase.table.name=aailogging.dev
./aai/charts/aai-traversal/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:hbase.table.timestamp.format=YYYYMMdd-HH:mm:ss:SSS
./aai/charts/aai-traversal/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:hbase.zookeeper.quorum=localhost
./aai/charts/aai-traversal/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:hbase.zookeeper.property.clientPort=2181
./aai/charts/aai-traversal/resources/config/aaiconfig.properties:hbase.zookeeper.znode.parent=/hbase
